import subprocess

# Try to start SSH
subprocess.run(['service', 'ssh', 'start'], capture_output=True)

# Check if it's running
result = subprocess.run(['pgrep', 'sshd'], capture_output=True)
if result.stdout.strip():
    out1 = "✅ SSH started successfully"
else:
    out1 = "❌ SSH failed to start. Installing..."
